startPoint.en: Talk to the little ghost by the Wilderness wall north-east of Varrock.
startPoint.es: Habla con el pequeño fantasma junto al muro del Wilderness, al noreste de Varrock.

items.name: Ghostspeak amulet
items.display: Ghostspeak amulet or cramulet (unless the player has claimed the reward for completing the hard Morytania achievements)

items.name: Spirit scorpion pouch
items.display: 1-3 Spirit scorpion pouch (more of each pouch if your reflexes are not relatively fast)

items.name: Summoning point
items.display: At least 4 summoning points, but preferably full summoning points

items.name: Limpwurt seed
items.display: Limpwurt seed (obtainable during quest, not guaranteed, not needed if you already have a limpwurt plant planted in the patch beforehand)

recommended.name: Ectophial
recommended.display: One-click teleport (such as Ectophial or House Teleport which can prevent you from losing items from the death by poison)

recommended.name: Weight-reducing clothing
recommended.display: Weight-reducing and energy-restoring items highly recommended for prolonging run energy

recommended.name: Supreme growth potion (leafy)
recommended.display: Supreme growth potion (leafy) to make the limpwurt plant grow much faster

recommended.name: Food
recommended.display: Food in case you accidentally get too close to the beast and take damage

recommended.name: To get to the quest start quickly, players can use:
recommended.display: To get to the quest start quickly, players can use:

children.name: Archaeology
children.display: 20 Archaeology to quickly reach the Infernal Source Dig Site through the dig site map in the Archaeology Guild

children.name: Fort Forinthry lodestone
children.display: Fort Forinthry lodestone, built after completing the quest New Foundations

rewards.name: Spirit Realm
rewards.display: A new Spirit Realm to explore

rewards.name: Ghostly warrior
rewards.display: Ability to fight the level 42 Ghostly warriors at the Spirit realm magic axe hut.

rewards.name: Cursed Magic Tree
rewards.display: Access to the Cursed Magic Tree

rewards.name: Goth leprechaun
rewards.display: Access to a Goth leprechaun in level 22 wilderness, as well as the flower patch he guards.

postQuest.display: By operating the ring on the portal in the Western ruins, 15,000 experience will be acquired.
By operating the ring on the portal in the Forgotten Cemetery, 15,000 experience will be acquired.

By operating the ring on the portal near the magic axe hut (North-East of the Ardougne-Wilderness lever inside the wilderness), 11,250 experience will be acquired. (Take a lockpick if you wish to open the hut doors.)

postQuest.name: Summer's End
postQuest.display: There are also weak portals that can only be used after completing the sequel to this quest - Summer's End.

text.en: Ghostspeak amulet
Talk to the spirit at the Wilderness wall north of Infernal Source Dig Site.
text.es: Habla con el espíritu en el muro del Wilderness, al norte de Infernal Source Dig Site.

text.en: Keep trying to catch the spirit until you see a cutscene.
text.es: Sigue intentando atrapar al espíritu hasta que veas una cinemática.

text.en: Talk to the father figure with a ghostspeak amulet equipped.
text.es: Habla con la figura paterna llevando puesto un ghostspeak amulet.

text.en: Use the table below to respond to the man's emotes.
text.es: Usa la tabla de abajo para responder a los emotes del hombre.

text.en: Don't repeat yourself.
text.es: No te repitas.

text.en: Use the Think emote to see the emote again. Talk to him and your character will say the emote he is doing.
text.es: Usa el emote Pensar para volver a ver el emote. Háblale y tu personaje dirá el emote que está haciendo.

text.en: The rings around the girl will disappear on successful emotes. When all the rings are gone, the girl is free.
text.es: Los anillos alrededor de la chica desaparecerán con cada emote exitoso. Cuando todos los anillos hayan desaparecido, la chica quedará libre.

text.en: Once the girl is free, talk to her.
text.es: Una vez que la chica esté libre, habla con ella.

chatOptions: 1 Okay, I will come with you to the village you're talking about.

text.en: none
Supreme growth potion (leafy)
Once in the village, ask the girl to be taken back.
text.es: Una vez en la aldea, pídele a la chica que te lleve de vuelta.

chatOptions: 3 Can you take me back, please?

text.en: Search a crate for a limpwurt seed.
text.es: Busca en una caja una semilla de limpwurt.

text.en: Rake the farming patch and plant the seed.
text.es: Rastrilla la parcela de cultivo y planta la semilla.

text.en: Note: You can use a Supreme growth potion (leafy) on it, but do not harvest the roots yet.
text.es: Nota: Puedes usar una Supreme growth potion (leafy) en ella, pero no coseches las raíces todavía.

text.en: Wait limpwurt plant to grow (roughly 20 minutes), but do not harvest it. You cannot continue the quest until the plant grows.
text.es: Espera a que la planta de limpwurt crezca (unos 20 minutos), pero no la coseches. No podrás continuar la misión hasta que la planta crezca.

text.en: Pick up 4 steel nails and a hammer in the anvil building (south east).
text.es: Recoge 4 steel nails y un hammer en el edificio del yunque (sureste).

text.en: Note: Sometimes you will find only 3 nails there. More nails can be found in the sacks or the building west of the farming patch, near the bucket. You can also smith nails on the anvil.
text.es: Nota: A veces solo encontrarás 3 nails allí. Puedes encontrar más nails en los sacos o en el edificio al oeste de la parcela de cultivo, cerca del cubo. También puedes forjar nails en el yunque.

text.en: Pick up 2 planks in the centre-most building.
text.es: Recoge 2 planks en el edificio más central.

text.en: Use a plank on the wardrobe in the building south-east of the statue.
text.es: Usa un plank en el armario del edificio al sureste de la estatua.

text.en: With three free inventory slots, Pick from the Hollow log near the statue for button mushrooms.
text.es: Con tres espacios libres en el inventario, recolecta button mushrooms del Hollow log cerca de la estatua.

text.en: Grab a bucket from the building directly west of the farm patch.
text.es: Coge un bucket del edificio justo al oeste de la parcela de cultivo.

text.en: Use the bucket on the barrel of water south-east of the farming patch which is just outside the anvil building.
text.es: Usa el bucket en el barril de agua al sureste de la parcela de cultivo, justo fuera del edificio del yunque.

text.en: After the limpwurt plant is grown, talk to the spirit for a cutscene.
text.es: Después de que la planta de limpwurt haya crecido, habla con el espíritu para ver una cinemática.

text.en: Talk to her again and agree to come along.
text.es: Habla con ella de nuevo y acepta acompañarla.

text.en: None
Talk to Summer Bonde once more to be taken back.
text.es: Habla con Summer Bonde una vez más para que te lleve de vuelta.

text.en: Take a skull and 5 bones east of the farm.
text.es: Coge un skull y 5 bones al este de la granja.

text.en: Stand in the portal which is the white circle.
text.es: Colócate en el portal, que es el círculo blanco.

text.en: Talk to Summer Bonde.
text.es: Habla con Summer Bonde.

chatOptions: 2 What exactly is going on here?
1 Of course, I will help you.

text.en: Follow her and Climb-down the Trapdoor.
text.es: Síguela y baja por la Trapdoor.

text.en: Use the skull on the altar, then right-click each of the 5x bones to "Use" it on the altar. You do not need to move around the altar to use bones and skull.
text.es: Usa el skull en el altar, luego haz clic derecho en cada uno de los 5 bones para "Usar" en el altar. No necesitas moverte alrededor del altar para usar los bones y el skull.

text.en: Note: Take care not to bury the bones.
text.es: Nota: Ten cuidado de no enterrar los bones.

text.en: If she is not right next to you, Climb-up the ladder and then in both situations, talk to Summer again.
text.es: Si ella no está justo a tu lado, sube por la escalera y, en ambos casos, habla de nuevo con Summer.

chatOptions: 3 I better get to work, then.

text.en: Multiple Spirit wolf pouches, Desert wyrm pouches & Spirit scorpion pouches
food (for lower-levelled players).
Optional: Customise your interface to allow you to dismiss familiars as fast as possible.
text.es: Opcional: Personaliza tu interfaz para poder despedir a tus familiares lo más rápido posible.

text.en: Run north to the wolf platform.
text.es: Corre hacia el norte hasta la plataforma del lobo.

text.en: Summon a spirit wolf so that it stands on the platform (it doesn't have to be in the centre).
text.es: Invoca a un spirit wolf para que se coloque sobre la plataforma (no hace falta que esté en el centro).

text.en: The Spirit Beast will only be lured to a platform with a familiar summoned.
text.es: El Spirit Beast solo será atraído a una plataforma si tienes un familiar invocado.

text.en: Dismiss the familiar as soon as the beast steps on the platform. (As the spirit beast foot is midair about to land.)
text.es: Despide al familiar en cuanto la bestia pise la plataforma (justo cuando la pata del spirit beast esté en el aire a punto de aterrizar).

text.en: There will be a cutscene that plays the very first time the beast approaches the platform. This is not the success cutscene.
text.es: Se reproducirá una cinemática la primera vez que la bestia se acerque a la plataforma. Esta no es la cinemática de éxito.

text.en: The beast does not need to fully be on the platform.
text.es: La bestia no necesita estar completamente sobre la plataforma.

text.en: Your familiar will be dismissed immediately without the "are you sure" warning; a lightning effect will show if successful.
text.es: Tu familiar será despedido de inmediato sin el aviso de "¿estás seguro?"; si tiene éxito, se mostrará un efecto de rayo.

text.en: Don't let the beast consume your familiar, and don't move your familiar off the platform. It is helpful to try to position yourself between the beast and your familiar.
text.es: No dejes que la bestia consuma a tu familiar, y no muevas a tu familiar fuera de la plataforma. Es útil intentar colocarte entre la bestia y tu familiar.

text.en: A cutscene in which the spirit beast is electrified, and the next summoning platform will appear will play if you have succeeded.
text.es: Si has tenido éxito, se reproducirá una cinemática en la que el spirit beast queda electrificado, y aparecerá la siguiente plataforma de invocación.

text.en: If you have to teleport out for more pouches, you must talk to Summer by the quest start location to return to the spirit realm.
text.es: Si tienes que teletransportarte fuera para conseguir más pouches, debes hablar con Summer junto al lugar de inicio de la misión para volver al spirit realm.

text.en: Repeat this process with the desert wyrm, using the platform that appears during the cutscene. You can also push the Spirit Beast by walking at beast to position the creature, but it can give you some damage and may push you away sometimes.
text.es: Repite este proceso con el desert wyrm, usando la plataforma que aparece durante la cinemática. También puedes empujar al Spirit Beast caminando hacia él para colocar a la criatura, pero puede hacerte algo de daño y a veces puede empujarte lejos.

text.en: And again, for the spirit scorpion - the platform is far west.
text.es: Y de nuevo, para el spirit scorpion: la plataforma está muy al oeste.

text.en: Talk to any of the spirits by the Spirit Beast.
text.es: Habla con cualquiera de los espíritus junto al Spirit Beast.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
